slots: Tiger sightings, wildlife safari, forest landscapes
Begin your Chandrapur adventure with an early morning safari through Maharashtra's oldest and most celebrated tiger reserve. Keep an eye out for tigers, leopards, sloth bears, and diverse birdlife.
Learn about the reserve's unique ecosystem, conservation efforts, and the incredible variety of flora and fauna that thrive within the forest.
Relax by the tranquil waters of Irai Lake and watch the landscape come alive with migratory birds and stunning sunset colours.
Explore the buffer areas surrounding the reserve and experience the quieter side of the forest through guided nature trails and wildlife spotting opportunities.
Local culture, rural tourism, traditional lifestyles
Interact with local communities and gain insight into the traditions and livelihoods that have coexisted alongside the forests for generations.
Spend the evening immersed in nature, enjoying the sounds of the forest under a canopy of stars.
Ancient shrine, spiritual heritage, cultural significance
Visit one of Chandrapur's most revered temples and experience the spiritual traditions that continue to shape the region's cultural identity.
Ancient City Walls & Chandrapur Fort Precinct
Historic fortifications, regional history, heritage walk
Explore remnants of Chandrapur's historic fortifications and discover stories from the city's medieval past.
Conclude your journey with a peaceful visit to this picturesque lake, a favourite spot for nature lovers and birdwatchers.
